conservative.name: Owl of Wisdom
conservative.requirements: 6 favour. You must have a piece of food an owl would like to eat

success.description: A radiant owl settles on your shoulder and proceeds to advise you in voice that only you can hear. The owl's wisdom adds to Education, Intuition, Folklore, and Observation checks. The owl stay with you until the end of the episode or sunrise, whichever comes first

sigmarsComet.description: While the owl is with you, spent fortune points add to your Intelligence checks rather than
